careers.name: Data Scientist
careers.description: Extract actionable insights from large, complex datasets using statistical modelling and machine learning to drive business and scientific decisions.
education_path: B.Tech / B.Sc → Computer Science, Statistics, or Mathematics
M.Sc / M.Tech → Data Science or AI/ML (optional, high ROI)
Certifications → Google Data Analytics, IBM Data Science Professional
careers.job_market_note: Data Scientist roles are projected to grow 45 % by 2030. Severe shortage of skilled professionals in India and globally.
careers.work_environment: Office / Remote – tech company, startup, research lab, or consultancy
daily_tasks: Write code to clean and analyse data

careers.name: AI / ML Engineer
careers.description: Design, train, and deploy production-grade machine-learning systems and neural networks that solve real-world problems at scale.
education_path: B.Tech → Computer Science, AI, or Electronics
M.Tech / MS → Artificial Intelligence or Machine Learning
careers.job_market_note: India's AI market is growing at 25 % CAGR. AI engineers are the highest-paid tech professionals globally in 2024–25.
careers.work_environment: Tech companies, AI startups, research labs – mostly office/remote hybrid
daily_tasks: Review research papers and implement ideas

careers.name: Software Engineer
careers.description: Design, develop, and maintain software systems and applications that power the digital world.
education_path: B.Tech → Computer Science or Information Technology
careers.job_market_note: Software engineering is the single largest tech job category globally. Remote work has expanded opportunities enormously.
careers.work_environment: Product companies, service firms, startups – hybrid/remote common

careers.name: Robotics Engineer
careers.description: Design and build autonomous robotic systems that combine mechanical engineering, electronics, and AI for manufacturing, healthcare, and exploration.
education_path: Hands-on: Arduino, Raspberry Pi, ROS projects
careers.job_market_note: Industry 4.0, autonomous vehicles, surgical robots, and defence automation are driving massive demand.
careers.work_environment: R&D labs, manufacturing plants, aerospace firms, defence research
daily_tasks: Test and debug on physical hardware

careers.name: Research Scientist
careers.description: Conduct original scientific investigations to advance knowledge in physics, chemistry, biology, materials science, or computing.
careers.job_market_note: Global R&D investment is at an all-time high. Pharma, space, defence, and quantum computing research are booming.
careers.work_environment: University labs, national research institutions, private R&D centres

careers.name: Biomedical Engineer
careers.description: Apply engineering principles to healthcare — design medical devices, prosthetics, imaging systems, and drug-delivery technologies.
education_path: Optional → MD-PhD dual path for clinical-research focus
careers.job_market_note: Post-pandemic healthcare investment boom. Wearables, diagnostics, and medical AI are the fastest-growing segments.
careers.work_environment: Hospitals, medical device companies, pharma R&D, government labs

careers.name: UX / UI Designer
careers.description: Create intuitive, beautiful digital product experiences by combining user psychology, visual design, and interaction principles.
education_path: B.Des → Communication / Industrial Design from NID or NIFT
Portfolio of 5–8 case studies + internships essential
careers.job_market_note: Every digital product needs UX designers. The role has expanded into AI product design, AR/VR, and voice interfaces.
careers.work_environment: Product companies, design agencies, startups – remote-friendly

careers.name: Clinical Psychologist
careers.description: Assess and treat mental health disorders through therapeutic interventions, psychological testing, and counselling.
education_path: M.Phil (RCI-registered) or Ph.D for independent clinical practice
careers.job_market_note: Mental health awareness is rising dramatically. India has a severe shortage of trained psychologists — demand is outpacing supply.
careers.work_environment: Hospitals, private clinics, schools, NGOs, online therapy platforms

careers.name: Chartered Accountant (CA)
careers.description: Provide expert financial advice, audit accounts, ensure tax compliance, and guide businesses toward financial health and integrity.
education_path: CA Intermediate → + 3-year articleship at a CA firm
top_colleges_india: Articleship at Big 4 (Deloitte / PwC / EY / KPMG)
careers.job_market_note: CA remains one of India's most respected and well-paid professions. GST, IFRS adoption, and startup boom have sharply increased demand.
careers.work_environment: Big 4 firms, SME CA firms, corporate finance departments, Big Tech

careers.name: Investment Banker
careers.description: Facilitate large financial transactions — IPOs, M&A deals, and capital raising — for corporations, governments, and institutions.
education_path: B.Com / BBA / B.Tech from a top college
MBA (Finance) → IIMs / ISB / top international school
careers.job_market_note: India's startup ecosystem and capital markets are creating significant IB demand. Top IB roles remain highly competitive but extremely rewarding.
careers.work_environment: Bulge-bracket banks, boutique advisory firms, corporate treasury — intense but high-reward

careers.name: Entrepreneur / Startup Founder
careers.description: Identify market opportunities, take calculated risks, and build businesses from scratch — creating products, services, and jobs.
education_path: Any stream — passion and market insight matter far more
B.Tech / BBA / B.Com or even a focused gap year
Incubators: IIT / IIM / T-Hub / NASSCOM 10K Startups
entrance_exams: CAT / JEE for top college access
careers.job_market_note: India has 100+ unicorns. Government's Startup India and deep-tech funding are creating unprecedented opportunities for founders.
careers.work_environment: Your own startup — offices, garages, co-working spaces, or fully remote

careers.name: Civil Services Officer (IAS / IPS / IFS)
careers.description: Serve the nation through policy-making, administration, law enforcement, and diplomacy as the backbone of India's governance.
education_path: Optional coaching (Vajiram / Vision IAS) or structured self-study
entrance_exams: UPSC Civil Services Examination (Prelims + Mains + Interview)
careers.job_market_note: UPSC CSE is India's most prestigious exam — power, purpose, and impact attract lakhs of aspirants annually.
careers.work_environment: District administration, central ministries, embassies, police service

careers.name: Architect
careers.description: Design functional, safe, and aesthetically compelling buildings, spaces, and urban environments that shape human civilization.
careers.job_market_note: India's Smart Cities Mission and urban housing demand are driving significant growth. Sustainable and parametric design are booming niches.
careers.work_environment: Architecture firms, government urban development bodies, real-estate developers
daily_tasks: Consult with clients on design brief
Coordinate with structural and MEP consultants

careers.name: Advocate / Corporate Lawyer
careers.description: Represent clients, interpret laws, draft contracts, and advocate for justice across criminal, civil, corporate, or constitutional matters.
education_path: Class 11–12 → Any stream (Humanities preferred for BA LLB)
5-year integrated BA / BBA / B.Sc LLB via CLAT
Specialisation → Corporate, IP, Taxation, International Law
careers.job_market_note: India's startup ecosystem, digital regulations, and dispute resolution market are creating massive demand for corporate and tech lawyers.
careers.work_environment: Law firms, in-house legal departments, courts, international organisations

careers.name: Medical Doctor (MBBS + Specialisation)
careers.description: Diagnose and treat illnesses, injuries, and medical conditions — directly impacting human lives through clinical practice.
careers.job_market_note: India has a shortage of over 6 lakh doctors. Global pathways include USMLE (USA), PLAB (UK), AMC (Australia), and MCCQE (Canada).
careers.work_environment: Hospitals, clinics, research institutions, public health agencies

careers.name: Product Manager
careers.description: Define the vision, strategy, and roadmap for digital products — bridging engineering, design, and business to build things people love.
education_path: Any stream — B.Tech / BBA / B.Sc / BA
MBA from IIM or top B-school (fast-track route)
Or: 3–5 years in engineering / design / marketing first
Certifications: Pragmatic Institute, AIPMM, Product School
careers.job_market_note: PM is consistently one of the most-hired roles in tech. India's SaaS and consumer tech booms are creating enormous demand.
careers.work_environment: Tech companies, SaaS startups, e-commerce — mostly office/remote hybrid
daily_tasks: Align engineering, design, and business teams

careers.name: Fashion / Textile Designer
careers.description: Create clothing, accessories, and textile collections by combining aesthetic sensibility, cultural awareness, and garment construction expertise.
education_path: B.Des / B.F.Tech → Fashion Design from NIFT / NID
Optional: Master's in Fashion Management or Textile Technology
Portfolio is more important than marks
careers.job_market_note: India's fashion industry is one of the world's largest. Sustainable fashion and D2C brands are creating new design opportunities.
careers.work_environment: Fashion houses, textile mills, garment export firms, own label / D2C brand
daily_tasks: Present collections to buyers or clients

careers.name: Journalist / Media Professional
careers.description: Report, investigate, and communicate stories that inform the public — across print, digital, broadcast, or podcasting.
education_path: PG Diploma → Journalism from IIMC / MCRC Jamia
careers.job_market_note: Digital media transformation is creating demand for multimedia journalists. Data journalism and investigative reporting are premium niches.
careers.work_environment: Newsrooms, digital media startups, freelance, broadcasting studios

careers.name: Environmental Scientist
careers.description: Study the natural environment and develop solutions to environmental problems — climate change, pollution, biodiversity, and sustainability.
education_path: B.Sc / B.Tech → Environmental Science or Environmental Engineering
Ph.D for research and academic positions
careers.job_market_note: Climate crisis and ESG regulation are driving explosive demand. Sustainability consulting and carbon markets are booming sectors.
careers.work_environment: Government agencies, NGOs, consulting firms, research institutions

careers.name: Teacher / Academic Educator
careers.description: Educate, inspire, and empower the next generation in schools, colleges, or online platforms across any subject area.
education_path: Class 11–12 → Any stream based on subject specialisation
careers.job_market_note: India's EdTech boom and NEP 2020 reforms are creating significant demand for quality educators both offline and online.
careers.work_environment: Schools, colleges, EdTech platforms, coaching institutes, online tutoring
